title: Excalibur | Modern World Creation Compat
description: Compatibility patch between Excalibur resourcepack and Modern World Creation mod.
body:
This **unofficial** compatibility patch ensures that textures from the [**Modern World Creation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-world-creation) mod seamlessly integrate with the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resourcepack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned **Modern World Creation** mod buttons.
- Reworked the game mode images when creating a world.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside **Excalibur**.

**Special thanks to:**
- [**Maffhew**](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) - for the **Excalibur** resourcepack.
- [**Keksuccino**](https://modrinth.com/user/Keksuccino) - for the **Modern World Creation** mod.

If you enjoyed this compatibility patch, feel free to tell others about it!
